transcript: I'll show you three beginner friendly websites where you can start earning online right now. Number one, Microworkers. This website pays you for simple tasks like clicking, signing up, or testing apps. Most tasks are super easy and perfect for beginners. Number two, Remo Tasks. You get paid for completing basic online tasks like image labeling or data work. No skills needed and you can start immediately. Number three, Click Worker. This platform offers small jobs like surveys, writing, and app testing. It's one of the easiest ways to earn online as a beginner. If you're serious about making money online, pick one of these and start today. and subscribe for more daily earning
